'''鈭歵h-v-j''' ('''thavaja''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rhythm|rhythm]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-v-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rhythm|rhythm]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵h-v-j
|-
! Lemma
| thavaja
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thavajithi|thavajithi]] || [[word:thavajiji|thavajiji]] || [[word:thavajishi|thavajishi]] || [[word:thavaji|thavaji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thavajuthuth|thavajuthuth]] || [[word:thavajujuj|thavajujuj]] || [[word:thavajushush|thavajushush]] || [[word:thavaj|thavaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavajuthu|thavajuthu]] || [[word:thavajuju|thavajuju]] || [[word:thavajushu|thavajushu]] || [[word:thavaju|thavaju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavajufuth|thavajufuth]] || [[word:thavajufuj|thavajufuj]] || [[word:thavajufush|thavajufush]] || [[word:thavajuf|thavajuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thavajethe|thavajethe]] || [[word:thavajeje|thavajeje]] || [[word:thavajeshe|thavajeshe]] || [[word:thavaje|thavaje]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thavajothoth|thavajothoth]] || [[word:thavajojoj|thavajojoj]] || [[word:thavajoshosh|thavajoshosh]] || [[word:thavaj|thavaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavajotho|thavajotho]] || [[word:thavajojo|thavajojo]] || [[word:thavajosho|thavajosho]] || [[word:thavajo|thavajo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavajofoth|thavajofoth]] || [[word:thavajofoj|thavajofoj]] || [[word:thavajofosh|thavajofosh]] || [[word:thavajof|thavajof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thavaj忙th忙|thavaj忙th忙]] || [[word:thavaj忙j忙|thavaj忙j忙]] || [[word:thavaj忙sh忙|thavaj忙sh忙]] || [[word:thavaj忙|thavaj忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thavajathath|thavajathath]] || [[word:thavajajaj|thavajajaj]] || [[word:thavajashash|thavajashash]] || [[word:thavaj|thavaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavajatha|thavajatha]] || [[word:thavajaja|thavajaja]] || [[word:thavajasha|thavajasha]] || [[word:thavaja|thavaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavajafath|thavajafath]] || [[word:thavajafaj|thavajafaj]] || [[word:thavajafash|thavajafash]] || [[word:thavajaf|thavajaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:thavajasha|thavajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gothavajasha|gothavajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokithavajasha|gokithavajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:thavajn眉sha|thavajn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gothavajnkn眉sha|gothavajnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokithavajn眉sha|gokithavajn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thavajsh毛sha|thavajsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothavajnksh毛sha|gothavajnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithavajsh毛sha|gokithavajsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thavajrosha|thavajrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothavajnkrosha|gothavajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithavajrosha|gokithavajrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thavajmusha|thavajmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gothavajnkmusha|gothavajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithavajmusha|gokithavajmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:thavajsherasha|thavajsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gothavajnksherasha|gothavajnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokithavajsherasha|gokithavajsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:thavajngasha|thavajngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gothavajnkngasha|gothavajnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokithavajngasha|gokithavajngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thavajyasha|thavajyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gothavajnkyasha|gothavajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokithavajyasha|gokithavajyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:thavajyamasha|thavajyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gothavajnkyamasha|gothavajnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokithavajyamasha|gokithavajyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:thavajn眉sh毛sha|thavajn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gothavajnkn眉sh毛sha|gothavajnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokithavajn眉sh毛sha|gokithavajn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:thavajn眉rosha|thavajn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothavajnkn眉rosha|gothavajnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithavajn眉rosha|gokithavajn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thavajn眉musha|thavajn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothavajnkn眉musha|gothavajnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithavajn眉musha|gokithavajn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:thavajsh毛n眉sha|thavajsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gothavajnksh毛n眉sha|gothavajnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokithavajsh毛n眉sha|gokithavajsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:thavajsh毛rosha|thavajsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothavajnksh毛rosha|gothavajnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithavajsh毛rosha|gokithavajsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thavajsh毛musha|thavajsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothavajnksh毛musha|gothavajnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithavajsh毛musha|gokithavajsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:thavajron眉sha|thavajron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gothavajnkron眉sha|gothavajnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokithavajron眉sha|gokithavajron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:thavajrosh毛sha|thavajrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gothavajnkrosh毛sha|gothavajnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokithavajrosh毛sha|gokithavajrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thavajromusha|thavajromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothavajnkromusha|gothavajnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithavajromusha|gokithavajromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:thavajmun眉sha|thavajmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gothavajnkmun眉sha|gothavajnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokithavajmun眉sha|gokithavajmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:thavajmush毛sha|thavajmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gothavajnkmush毛sha|gothavajnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokithavajmush毛sha|gokithavajmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:thavajmurosha|thavajmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothavajnkmurosha|gothavajnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithavajmurosha|gokithavajmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:thavaj|thavaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:th忙v忙j|th忙v忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hothavaj|hothavaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoth忙v忙j|hoth忙v忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohothavaj|hohothavaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoth忙v忙j|hohoth忙v忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉thavaj|n眉thavaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉th忙v忙j|n眉th忙v忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉thavaj|n眉n眉thavaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉th忙v忙j|n眉n眉th忙v忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂thavaj|n茂thavaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂th忙v忙j|n茂th忙v忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂thavaj|n茂n茂thavaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂th忙v忙j|n茂n茂th忙v忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luthavaj|luthavaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luth忙v忙j|luth忙v忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluthavaj|luluthavaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluth忙v忙j|luluth忙v忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lithavaj|lithavaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lith忙v忙j|lith忙v忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilithavaj|lilithavaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilith忙v忙j|lilith忙v忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kothavaj|kothavaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koth忙v忙j|koth忙v忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokothavaj|kokothavaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoth忙v忙j|kokoth忙v忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kethavaj|kethavaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keth忙v忙j|keth忙v忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekethavaj|kekethavaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keketh忙v忙j|keketh忙v忙j]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
